title: Engaging Promotional Poster Design
brief: I’m looking for a graphic designer who can craft a bold, modern poster for publicite. The artwork needs to grab attention at first glance, follow current design trends, and communicate my message clearly. Scope • One-page poster sized for both print and digital use. • Visual style: contemporary, colourful, and brand-aligned. • Final files: print-ready PDF (CMYK), web-ready JPEG/PNG, and editable source (AI or PSD). What I’ll provide • Core copy and key imagery. • Brand colours and any mandatory logos. What I expect • Two initial concepts to choose from. • Up to two revision rounds on the selected direction. • Delivery of all agreed file formats on approval. If you have a portfolio that shows eye-catching posters or related promotional materials, I’d love to see it.
